---
id: on-interactivity-event
title: "On interactivity event"
description: "This is triggered when interactivity event is triggered. E.g., when user clicks button provided in previous messages."

  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/public/slack/on-event"}
  context={"endpoint"}

This is triggered when interactivity event is triggered. E.g., when user clicks button provided in previous messages.
